## Data Validation
- [ ] Schema validation passes: No errors in `data/processed/` files
- [ ] URL verification: All links are valid and accessible
- [ ] No duplicate entries: Cross-checked against existing data
- [ ] Source attribution: All sources cited, URLs provided
- [ ] Relationships documented: New edges defined if applicable

## Process Checklist
- [ ] No secrets or credentials added
- [ ] No local environment files committed (.venv, .env, etc.)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)
- [ ] README.md updated (if introducing new domains/features)

## Testing Evidence
<!-- If code changes: -->
- [ ] Unit tests pass locally (if applicable)
- [ ] `make validate` passes (if applicable)

## For Reviewers
**Approval checklist:**
- ✅ Data quality verified
- ✅ Source citations accurate  
- ✅ No duplicate entries
- ✅ Relationships correctly documented
- ✅ Schema validation passes
- ✅ URL health check passes
